'''Nicolas Anastassiou''' (born [[August 11]], [[1971]])<ref name="Cda" /> is a visual effects editor at [[Industrial Light & Magic]]. He was part of the crews that worked on the films [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']]<ref name="TPM">{{SWArchive|url=episode-i/bts/castcrew.html|text=''The Phantom Menace'' Cast and Crew}}</ref> and [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|''Star Wars'': Episode II ''Attack of the Clones'']].<ref name="AOTC">{{SWArchive|url=episode-ii/bts/castcrew.html|text=Episode II Cast and Crew}}</ref> Anastassiou also had a cameo role in ''Attack of the Clones'' as the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Nicanas Tassu/Legends|Nicanas Tassu]].<ref name="SWI77">{{InsiderCite|77|Ask Lobot|Ask the Master}}</ref> He later worked as an associate editor for the TV series ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars]]'' and a lead editor for [[Star Wars: The Bad Batch]].
